procedure.name: FolderTreeForUser

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, ft.&&PermissionId&& as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERTREEFORUSER(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by isnull(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, isnull(ft.&&SortType&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.text: create function &&FOLDERTREEFORUSER&&(@rootId bigint, @userId bigint, @treeId nvarchar(32)) RETURNS @result TABLE( Id bigint, Name nvarchar(max), Folder bigint, CreationAuthor bigint, CreationDate datetime, NodeTypeUid uniqueidentifier, ImageUrl nvarchar(max), Virtual bit, PermissionId uniqueidentifier, SortType bigint, Expanded bit, HasChild bit, Depth bigint) as begin insert into @result select distinct d.Id, d.&&Name&&, d.Folder, d.CreationAuthor, d.CreationDate, d.TypeUid NodeTypeUid, f.ImageUrl, d.Virtual, p.PermissionId, d.SortTypeId, s1.Expanded, f.HasChildFolders HasChild, r1.Depth from sys_DmsObjectRelation r1 inner join sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState s on s.dmsobject = r1.Child inner join sys_DmsObjectRelation r2 on r2.Parent = s.dmsobject inner join Folder f on f.Id = r2.Child inner join DmsObject d on d.Id = f.Id inner join DmsObjectPermission p on p.DmsObject = f.Id inner join UserSecuritySetCache c on c.SetId = p.UserSecuritySetCacheId left join sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState s1 on s1.TreeId = @treeId and s1.&&User&& = @userId and s1.DmsObject = f.id and s1.Expanded = 1 and s1.ParentExpanded = 1 where (d.IsDeleted is null or d.IsDeleted = 0) and c.UserId = @userId and r1.Parent = @rootId and s.TreeId = @treeId and s.&&User&& = @userId and s.Expanded = 1 and s.ParentExpanded = 1 and r2.Depth < 2 and r2.&&Owner&& in (@userId, 0) return end

procedure.name: FolderTreeForAdmin

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, null as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERTREEFORADMIN(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by isnull(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, isnull(ft.&&SortType&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.text: create function &&FOLDERTREEFORADMIN&&(@rootId bigint, @userId bigint, @treeId nvarchar(32)) RETURNS @result TABLE( Id bigint, Name nvarchar(max), Folder bigint, CreationAuthor bigint, CreationDate datetime, NodeTypeUid uniqueidentifier, ImageUrl nvarchar(max), Virtual bit, SortType bigint, Expanded bit, HasChild bit, Depth bigint) as begin insert into @result select distinct d.Id, d.&&Name&&, d.Folder, d.CreationAuthor, d.CreationDate, d.TypeUid NodeTypeUid, f.ImageUrl, d.Virtual, d.SortTypeId, s1.expanded, f.HasChildFolders HasChild, r1.Depth from sys_DmsObjectRelation r1 inner join sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState s on s.dmsobject = r1.Child inner join sys_DmsObjectRelation r2 on r2.Parent = s.DmsObject inner join Folder f on f.Id = r2.Child inner join DmsObject d on d.Id = f.id left join sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState s1 on s1.treeId = @treeId and s1.&&User&& = @userId and s1.DmsObject = f.Id and s1.Expanded = 1 and s1.ParentExpanded = 1 where (d.IsDeleted is null or d.IsDeleted = 0) and r1.Parent = @rootId and s.TreeId = @treeId and s.&&User&& = @userId and s.Expanded = 1 and s.ParentExpanded = 1 and r2.Depth < 2 and r2.&&Owner&& in (@userId, 0) return end

procedure.name: FolderFullTreeForUser

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, ft.&&PermissionId&& as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERFULLTREEFORUSER(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by isnull(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, isnull(ft.&&SortType&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.text: create function &&FOLDERFULLTREEFORUSER&&(@rootId bigint, @userId bigint, @treeId nvarchar(32)) RETURNS @result TABLE( Id bigint, Name nvarchar(max), Folder bigint, CreationAuthor bigint, CreationDate datetime, NodeTypeUid uniqueidentifier, ImageUrl nvarchar(max), Virtual bit, PermissionId uniqueidentifier, SortType bigint, Expanded bit, HasChild bit, Depth bigint) as begin insert into @result select d.Id, d.&&Name&&, d.Folder, d.CreationAuthor, d.CreationDate, d.TypeUid NodeTypeUid, f.ImageUrl, d.Virtual, p.PermissionId, d.SortTypeId, s.Expanded, f.HasChildFolders HasChild, r.Depth from sys_DmsObjectRelation r inner join Folder f on f.Id = r.Child inner join DmsObject d on d.Id = f.Id inner join DmsObjectPermission p on p.DmsObject = f.Id inner join UserSecuritySetCache c on c.SetId = p.UserSecuritySetCacheId left join sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState s on s.TreeId = @treeId and s.&&User&& = @userId and s.DmsObject = f.Id and s.Expanded = 1 and s.ParentExpanded = 1 where (d.IsDeleted is null or d.IsDeleted = 0) and c.UserId = @userId and r.Parent = @rootId and r.&&Owner&& in (@userId, 0) return end

procedure.name: FolderFullTreeForAdmin

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, null as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERFULLTREEFORADMIN(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by isnull(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, isnull(ft.&&SortType&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.text: create function &&FOLDERFULLTREEFORADMIN&&(@rootId bigint, @userId bigint, @treeId nvarchar(32)) RETURNS @result TABLE( Id bigint, Name nvarchar(max), Folder bigint, CreationAuthor bigint, CreationDate datetime, NodeTypeUid uniqueidentifier, ImageUrl nvarchar(max), Virtual bit, SortType bigint, Expanded bit, HasChild bit, Depth bigint) as begin insert into @result select d.Id, d.&&Name&&, d.Folder, d.CreationAuthor, d.CreationDate, d.TypeUid NodeTypeUid, f.ImageUrl, d.Virtual, d.SortTypeId, s.Expanded, f.HasChildFolders HasChild, r.Depth from sys_DmsObjectRelation r inner join Folder f on f.Id = r.Child inner join DmsObject d on d.Id = f.Id left join sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState s on s.TreeId = @treeId and s.&&User&& = @userId and s.DmsObject = f.Id and s.Expanded = 1 and s.ParentExpanded = 1 where (d.IsDeleted is null or d.IsDeleted = 0) and r.Parent = @rootId and r.&&Owner&& in (@userId, 0) return end

procedure.name: FolderFullTree

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select Id, Name, CreationDate, ft.Folder as FolderId, CreationAuthor, NodeTypeUid, ft.ImageUrl as ImageUrl, ft.Virtual as Virtual, null as PermissionId, null as Expanded, ft.HasChild, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERFULLTREE(:rootId) ft

procedure.text: create function &&FOLDERFULLTREE&&(@rootId bigint) RETURNS @result TABLE( Id bigint, Name nvarchar(max), Folder bigint, CreationAuthor bigint, CreationDate datetime, NodeTypeUid uniqueidentifier, ImageUrl nvarchar(max), Virtual bit, SortType bigint, HasChild bit, Depth bigint) as begin insert into @result select d.Id, d.&&Name&&, d.Folder, d.CreationAuthor, d.CreationDate, d.TypeUid NodeTypeUid, f.ImageUrl, d.Virtual, d.SortTypeId, f.HasChildFolders HasChild, r.Depth from sys_DmsObjectRelation r inner join Folder f on f.Id = r.Child inner join DmsObject d on d.Id = f.Id where (d.IsDeleted is null or d.IsDeleted = 0) and r.Parent = @rootId return end

procedure.name: GetRootQuery

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select Id, Name, FolderId, FolderType, CreationAuthor from GETROOTFOLDER(:folderId)

procedure.text: create function [GETROOTFOLDER](@folder bigint) RETURNS @result TABLE( Id bigint, Name nvarchar(max), FolderId bigint, FolderType int, CreationAuthor bigint ) as begin insert into @result select d.id, d.name, d.folder, f.foldertype, d.creationauthor from sys_dmsobjectrelation r inner join folder f on f.id=r.Parent inner join dmsobject d on d.id=f.id where r.child = @folder order by r.depth return end

procedure.name: GetSubfoldersQuery
procedure.text: create function [GetSubfolders](@folderId bigint) RETURNS @result TABLE(ID bigint) as begin insert into @result select r.child from sys_dmsobjectrelation r where r.parent = @folderId order by r.depth return end

procedure.name: GetSubDmsObjectsQuery

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select Id, NodeTypeUid, FolderId from GetSubDmsObjectsQuery(:folderId)

procedure.text: create function [GetSubDmsObjectsQuery](@folder bigint) returns @result TABLE ( Id bigint, NodeTypeUid uniqueidentifier, FolderId bigint ) as begin insert into @result select d.id, d.typeuid, d.folder from sys_dmsobjectrelation r inner join dmsobject d on d.folder = r.child where r.Parent = @folder return end

procedure.name: UpdateInheritDmsObjectPermissions
UpdateInheritDmsObjectPermissionsPatch
GetSubgroupsMGroups
procedure.text: create function [GetSubgroupsMGroups](@groupId bigint) RETURNS @result TABLE(ID bigint) as begin with Rec as ( select Id, ParentGroup from [DocumentMetadataGroup] where Id = @groupId union all select dm.Id, dm.ParentGroup from DocumentMetadataGroup dm inner join Rec on Rec.Id = dm.ParentGroup ) INSERT @result select Rec.Id as Id from Rec return end

procedure.name: GetPermissionToAdd

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select UserId, GroupId, OrganizationItemPositionId, OrganizationItemEmployeeId from GetPermissionToAdd(:leftObject, :rightObject)

WITH cte AS ( SELECT TOP(:count) pruqi.* FROM [DmsObjectPermissionUpdateQueueItem] pruqi WITH (ROWLOCK, READPAST) WHERE [ServerConnectionUid] IS NULL AND [Attempt] < :attemptLength AND [NextUpdateDate] <= :currentTimestamp ) UPDATE cte SET [ServerConnectionUid] = :serverConnectionUid, [LastUpdateDate] = :currentTimestamp OUTPUT inserted.[Id], inserted.[Patch], inserted.[DmsObject], inserted.[Attempt], inserted.[User], inserted.[FolderId], inserted.[FolderName]

WITH cte AS ( SELECT [ServerConnectionUid] FROM [DmsObjectPermissionUpdateQueueItem] WITH (ROWLOCK, READPAST) WHERE [ServerConnectionUid] = :serverConnectionUid ) UPDATE cte SET [ServerConnectionUid] = null

procedure.name: GetDocumentsFromFolder
procedure.text: create function [GetDocumentsFromFolder](@folderId bigint) RETURNS @result TABLE(id bigint not null Primary KEY, folder bigint, CreationAuthor bigint) as begin with rec(&&Id&&, &&Folder&&, &&CreationAuthor&&) as ( select d.&&Id&&, d.&&Folder&&, d.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&DmsObject&& d where d.&&Id&& = @folderId union all select dc.&&Id&&, dc.&&Folder&&, dc.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&DmsObject&& dc inner join rec on rec.&&Id&& = dc.&&Folder&& and dc.&&InheritPermissions&& = 1 ) insert into @result (id, folder, CreationAuthor) select * from rec where &&id&& != @folderId return end

procedure.name: DmsObjectPermissionPatch

script.name: CreateLoadPermissions
script.text: declare @insCounter bigint, @insStartId bigint, @insEndId bigint; SELECT @insCounter = COUNT(*) FROM DmsObjectPermission where PermissionId = 'EBD6105A-AB44-404D-8B03-1D260EBB2881'; EXECUTE [G_GenId] 'DmsObjectPermission', @insCounter, @insStartId out, @insEndId out; INSERT INTO DmsObjectPermission ( [Id], [Uid], DmsObject, PermissionId, [User], [Group], OrganizationItemPosition, OrganizationItemEmployee, UserSecuritySetCacheId, PermissionRole, InheritedFromFolder ) SELECT @insStartId + ROW_NUMBER() over (order by (SELECT 1)) - 1, NEWID(), DmsObject, '8DD6E1D3-08B3-46CA-9B0C-FEEB98FCF20D', [User], [Group], OrganizationItemPosition, OrganizationItemEmployee, UserSecuritySetCacheId, PermissionRole, InheritedFromFolder from DmsObjectPermission p where p.PermissionId = 'EBD6105A-AB44-404D-8B03-1D260EBB2881'

index.name: IX_DmsObjectPermission_PermissionId_DmsoObject
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObjectPermission_PermissionId_DmsoObject] ON [DmsObjectPermission] ( DmsObject ASC, [PermissionId] ASC ) include(UserSecuritySetCacheId) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, DROP_EXISTING = OFF, ONLINE = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

index.name: IX_DmsObjectRelationPC
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObjectRelationPC] ON [Sys_DmsObjectRelation] ( [Parent] ASC, [Child] ASC )

index.name: IX_DmsObjectRelationPDO
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObjectRelationPDO] ON [Sys_DmsObjectRelation] ( [Parent] ASC, [Depth] ASC, [Owner] ASC ) INCLUDE ([Child])

index.name: IX_DmsObjectRelationCD
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObjectRelationCD] ON [Sys_DmsObjectRelation] ( [Child] ASC, [Depth] ASC ) INCLUDE ([Parent])

index.name: IX_DmsObjectTree_TUD
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObjectTree_TUD] ON [Sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState] ( [TreeId] ASC, [User] ASC, [DmsObject] ASC )

index.name: IX_DmsObjTreeState_TUEP
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObjTreeState_TUEP] ON [Sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState] ( [TreeId] ASC, [User] ASC, [Expanded] ASC, [ParentExpanded] ASC ) INCLUDE([DmsObject])

index.name: IX_DmsObjTreeState_Timestamp
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObjTreeState_Timestamp] ON [Sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState] ( [Timestamp] ASC, [TreeId] ASC )

index.name: IX_DmsObject_Folder
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_DmsObject_Folder] ON [DmsObject] ( [Folder] ASC, [InheritPermissions] ASC ) INCLUDE([CreationAuthor])
